generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for position and velocity measurement on first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox for position measurement on first axis drive train"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for first axis drive train"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current measurement data (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) calculated from motor current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) for first axis structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for first axis structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for friction dynamics in first axis drive train"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for overall dynamics of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for first axis digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation and friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombViscousFrictionIdentificationService, StribeckFrictionIdentificationService, DahlFrictionIdentificationService, LuGreFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASIntegrationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService, CoulombViscousFrictionIdentificationService, StribeckFrictionIdentificationService, DahlFrictionIdentificationService, LuGreFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualization of robot axis data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot axis data on dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of Coulomb-Viscous friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides CoulombViscousFrictionParameters
]

instance StribeckFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of Stribeck friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides StribeckFrictionParameters
]

instance DahlFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of Dahl friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides DahlFrictionParameters
]

instance LuGreFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of LuGre friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides LuGreFrictionParameters
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance AASIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell integration for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:provides AASManagementInsight
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameters of Coulomb-Viscous friction model used for control algorithm updates"
]

instance StribeckFrictionParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameters of Stribeck friction model used for control algorithm updates"
]

instance DahlFrictionParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameters of Dahl friction model used for control algorithm updates"
]

instance LuGreFrictionParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameters of LuGre friction model used for control algorithm updates"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized data for robot axis performance monitoring"
]

instance AASManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell management insights for digital twin"
]

instance UpdateControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of control algorithms with friction compensation parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in first axis drive train"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in first axis drive train"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear in first axis drive train"
]

instance FirstAxisRobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot from MABI Robotic AG"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing with live measurements"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components, sensors, AAS, SysML models, Simulink simulations, MQTT data streaming, and dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring and analysis"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (real-time operational phase)"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards"
]
